caption:
🎬 Anime Details...

* Anime Name: Hunter x Hunter
* Anime Episodes: 148 (2011 version)
* Anime Seasons: 6 (categorized arcs)
* Anime MAL Rating: 9.0+ ⭐
* Anime Short Description: Gon Freecss sets out to become a Hunter and find his father, facing deadly exams, powerful enemies, and intense Nen battles.
* Is it ongoing? (Yes/No): No (anime paused)
* Future updates or interesting news: No continuation announced; manga activity influences any potential return.

📚 Manga Details

* Manga Name: Hunter x Hunter
* Volumes: 37+
* Rating: 8.7+ ⭐
* Future updates: Manga resumed intermittently; author Yoshihiro Togashi continues releasing chapters irregularly due to health breaks.

#HunterXHunter #HxH #GonFreecss #AnimeFans #MangaUpdates

🎬 Anime Details...

* Anime Name: Assassination Classroom
* Anime Episodes: 47
* Anime Seasons: 2
* Anime MAL Rating: 8.1+ ⭐
* Anime Short Description: Class 3-E must assassinate their super-powered teacher, Koro-sensei, before he destroys Earth—while he helps them grow academically and personally.
* Is it ongoing? (Yes/No): No
* Future updates or interesting news: Anime concluded in 2016; continues to trend for its emotional finale and character arcs.

📚 Manga Details

* Manga Name: Assassination Classroom
* Volumes: 21
* Rating: 8.2+ ⭐
* Future updates: Manga ended in 2016; anniversary projects and spin-offs remain fan favorites.

#AssassinationClassroom #KoroSensei #AnimeCommunity #ShonenJump #MangaFans

🎬 Anime Details...

* Anime Name: Junji Ito Maniac: Japanese Tales of the Macabre
* Anime Episodes: 12
* Anime Seasons: 1
* Anime MAL Rating: 6.2+ ⭐
* Anime Short Description: A chilling horror anthology adapting 20 eerie stories by Junji Ito, featuring grotesque creatures, psychological terror, and unsettling twists.
* Is it ongoing? (Yes/No): No
* Future updates or interesting news: Released globally on Netflix in 2023; fans await more faithful adaptations of Ito’s works.

📚 Manga Details

* Manga Name: Junji Ito Collection
* Volumes: Multiple standalone volumes
* Rating: 8.3+ ⭐
* Future updates: Junji Ito continues releasing new horror one-shots and special editions.

#JunjiIto #HorrorAnime #JapaneseHorror #AnimeAnthology #MangaHorror

🎬 Anime Details...

* Anime Name: Spy × Family
* Anime Episodes: 37+
* Anime Seasons: 2
* Anime MAL Rating: 8.5+ ⭐
* Anime Short Description: Master spy Loid Forger builds a fake family for a mission, unaware his “wife” is an assassin and his “daughter” is a telepath. Chaos and wholesome moments follow.
* Is it ongoing? (Yes/No): Yes
* Future updates or interesting news: Season 3 has been officially announced, continuing the Forger family’s story.

📚 Manga Details

* Manga Name: Spy × Family
* Volumes: 13+
* Rating: 8.6+ ⭐
* Future updates: Manga is ongoing with regular chapter releases and growing global popularity.

#SpyXFamily #AnyaForger #LoidForger #YorForger #AnimeUpdates

🎬 Anime Details

* Anime Name: The Daily Life of the Immortal King
* Anime Episodes: 50+
* Anime Seasons: 4
* Anime MAL Rating: 7.3+ ⭐
* Anime Short Description: Wang Ling is an overpowered cultivation genius who just wants a normal school life, but his immense power constantly causes chaotic and hilarious situations.
* Is it ongoing? (Yes/No): Yes
* Future updates or interesting news: New seasons continue releasing with growing international popularity among donghua fans.

📚 Manga / Novel Details

* Manga Name: The Daily Life of the Immortal King
* Volumes: 20+ (adaptations & web chapters)
* Rating: 7.5+ ⭐
* Future updates: The original web novel and manhua adaptations continue expanding the story.

🎬 Anime Details

* Anime Name: The Fable
* Anime Episodes: 25
* Anime Seasons: 1
* Anime MAL Rating: 7.6+ ⭐
* Anime Short Description: A legendary hitman known as “The Fable” is ordered to live as a normal citizen for a year without killing anyone, leading to intense and often hilarious situations.
* Is it ongoing? (Yes/No): Yes
* Future updates or interesting news: Anime premiered in 2024 and adapts the popular crime manga with more story arcs expected.

📚 Manga Details

* Manga Name: The Fable
* Volumes: 22 (original series)
* Rating: 8.2+ ⭐
* Future updates: Sequel manga The Fable: The Second Contact continues the story.
